title: HERMES & LOCAL AGENTS — Free Labor, Made Stable
tagline: A free 24/7 workforce is installed and idle. ~40 min to routing, stability, and your first auto-closed task.
fin_text: Three tasks a week close themselves, zero API cost. The Sunday brief is waiting Monday morning.

levels.title: LEVEL 0 · WHAT YOU OWN
levels.html:
The fleet, on paper

hermes + ollama = local models, $0 per token, no rate limits, private. Your design (ROLE.md) routes them to free recurring work — research briefs, draft passes, competitor scans — via agentwatch, while paid/judgment work stays manual. The audit: zero evidence any of it ever ran. Latent capacity, fully installed.

The honest tradeoff

Local models are worse per-task than Claude and infinitely cheaper per month. The skill of this course is matching the work to the floor: high-volume, low-stakes, retryable tasks. Wrong matching is why people give up on local agents; right matching is free compounding labor.

opts: High-volume, low-stakes, retryable work (research scans, first drafts)
quiz.ex: Local models earn their keep on volume where a 7/10 result is fine and a retry is free. Anything a stranger sees or money touches goes through Claude or you.

mission.txt: Inventory check in your next local session: `ollama list` — write into the nucleus which models are actually installed and their sizes. Know your fleet.

levels.title: LEVEL 1 · ROUTING
levels.html:
Per-agent model routing

The org chart already names the workers: ssa-research, byb-research, lai-research, mm-research (T015–T019, never claimed). Routing = each agent name maps to a model + a system prompt. Research agents → your strongest local model; bulk scans → the fastest one. The bus stays the single interface — agents differ only in who picks the task up.

Voice training is a system prompt, not fine-tuning

Your house style is already written down (ROLE.md: caveman-warm, one line, action-first). Paste it into the agent's system prompt with 2–3 example outputs. That's 90% of 'training hermes on your voice' — no GPUs harmed.

quiz.q: How do you give hermes 'your voice'?
opts: System prompt: your written style rules + 2–3 examples
quiz.ex: Style transfer for agent output is a prompt problem. ROLE.md already contains the style guide — it just needs to be wired into the agent definitions.

mission.txt: With Claude in a local session: write the routing table (agent → model → system prompt w/ your style rules) for the 4 research agents. It lives in .claude/os/ next to ventures.md.

levels.title: LEVEL 2 · STABILITY — silence must be impossible
levels.html:
The #1 local-agent failure isn't crashing — it's crashing QUIETLY

A dead loop looks identical to an empty queue. Three rules make silence impossible:

  • Heartbeat: agentwatch logs a timestamped line every cycle; standup checks 'last heartbeat < 1h' as a health light.
  • No lost work: a task that fails goes BACK to the bus flagged ⚠️, never into the void. Check-then-claim, write-then-done.
  • Retry then escalate: 2 local retries, then the task is flagged for Claude/you. Local agents never silently eat a task.

Crash policy

Run agentwatch under a supervisor (even a while-true wrapper with backoff). It should survive a model OOM, an ollama restart, and your laptop sleeping — and say so in the log when it does.

quiz.q: Why is a heartbeat log non-negotiable?
opts: A dead loop is indistinguishable from an empty queue without one
quiz.ex: Silence-is-success systems rot invisibly — exactly how agentwatch sat unused for a month without anyone noticing. The standup health light ('heartbeat < 1h ✅') makes rot visible in one glance.

mission.txt: Next local session: have Claude add heartbeat + failed-task-returns-to-bus + retry-then-escalate to agentwatch, then kill it mid-task and verify the task survives. Break it on purpose, once.

levels.title: LEVEL 3 · THE SUNDAY BRIEF + BOSS
levels.html:
The flagship recurring job

Every Sunday night, hermes runs the venture research sweep (the T015–T019 work that's never been claimed): competitor moves, content angles, one opportunity per venture — pushed into the nucleus as a handoff. Monday's standup opens with intelligence you didn't have to gather.

Proof of success (from the audit)

3 auto-completed tasks per week, 0 silent errors, Sunday brief in the nucleus by Monday morning. When that's true for two consecutive weeks, this course is done and your payroll grew by one tireless employee earning ₪0.

boss.q: A task fails on hermes. It should…
opts: Return to the bus flagged ⚠️, retry ×2, then escalate

boss.q: The health check at standup is…

opts: 3 auto-tasks/week, 0 silent errors, Sunday brief by Monday

mission.txt: Commission the Sunday brief: in your next local session tell Claude 'wire the Sunday research sweep to hermes via agentwatch.' First Monday it lands in the nucleus = graduation.
